nasb.text: and behold, seven cows, fat and sleek came up out of the Nile, and they grazed in the marsh grass.

esv.text: Seven cows, plump and attractive, came up out of the Nile and fed in the reed grass.

cnv.text: 有七頭母牛從河裡上來，又肥壯又健美，在蘆葦中吃草。

ccb.text: 有七头肥美、健壮的母牛从河里上来，在芦苇丛中吃草。

csbs.text: 看哪！有七头肥壮健美的母牛从尼罗河里上来，在芦苇中吃草。
